calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls have been more accurate (4/5 correct) than BULLISH, suggesting I'm reading downside signals well in this high-vol regime. However, I missed IWM and TSLA reversals when they bounced off support - I need to weight oversold conditions more heavily. For SPY/QQQ, my 45% confidence BEARISH calls were appropriately cautious given the choppy action. Today's massive SPX call buying ($748M) contradicts the bearish flow, requiring careful balance between near-term weakness and institutional long positioning.
